http://www.ocean.iap.ac.cn/ftp/images_files/Stratification_global_time_series.txt

%%% Global Stratification (0-2000m) time series from 1940 to present (v1, Monthly)
%%% Li, Guancheng, L. Cheng*, J. Zhu*, K. E. Trenberth, M. E. Mann, J. P. Abraham, 2020: Increasing ocean stratification over the past half century. Nature Climate Change, in press. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41558-020-00918-2

%%% Update date: Jan 2024 by L.Cheng
%%% unit of Stratification:  10^-7 s^鈥�2 yr^鈥�1
%%% Baseline: 1960-2018

%%% Link to Ocean Gridded Stratification Analysis: 
%%% ftp://ds1.iap.ac.cn/ftp/cheng/CZ16_v1_IAP_Stratification_gridded_1month_netcdf/
%%% OR:  https://pan.cstcloud.cn/s/E0zjDQOeRfs


[year]  [month]  [global mean SC]  [+2s.d. error] [-2s.d. error]
